content.problemStatement:
You are given a string SSS of length NNN consisting only of A's and B's.
You will be given QQQ queries each of which can be either of Type 1 or Type 2.


For a query of Type 1, you will be given two numbers LLL and RRR and a character CCC. You are supposed to replace every character in SSS from position LLL to RRR with CCC.
For a query of Type 2, you will be given 4 numbers LLL, RRR, ppp and qqq. Now, for every character in SSS from position LLL to RRR, perform the following operations in the order left to right:

If the character is "A", then replace ppp with (p−q+MOD)%MOD(p - q+MOD)\%MOD(p−q+MOD)%MOD and qqq with (p+q)%MOD(p+q)\%MOD(p+q)%MOD.
If the character is "B", then replace ppp with (p+q)%MOD(p+q)\%MOD(p+q)%MOD and qqq with (q−p+MOD)%MOD(q-p+MOD)\%MOD(q−p+MOD)%MOD.


MODMODMOD is 109+710^9+7109+7.

Your task is to print the final values of ppp and qqq for each query of Type 2.
###Input:


First line will contain TTT, number of testcases. Then the testcases follow.
Each testcase contains multiple lines of input.
The first line of a testcase contains the integer NNN
The second line containes the string SSS
The third line contains the number of queries for that testcase, QQQ
The next QQQ lines contain the actual queries.

For Type 1 query, the input would be 111 LLL RRR CCC
For Type 2 query, the input would be 222 LLL RRR ppp qqq


###Output:
For each testcase, for each query of type 2, output in separate lines the value of ppp followed by qqq.
###Constraints


1≤T≤51 \leq T \leq 51≤T≤5
1≤N≤1051 \leq N \leq 10^51≤N≤105
1≤Q≤1041 \leq Q \leq 10^41≤Q≤104
0≤p,q≤1090 \leq p,q \leq 10^90≤p,q≤109
1≤L,R≤N1 \leq L,R \leq N1≤L,R≤N
C∈A,BC \in {A,B}C∈A,B
The sum of NNN over all testcases is less than equal to 10510^5105 and sum of QQQ over all testcases is less than equal to 10410^4104
###Sample Input:
1
2
AA
3
1 2 2 B
2 1 1 1 1
2 1 2 1 2

###Sample Output:
0 2
2 4
content.inputFormat: First line contains an integer T. Each test case contains multiple lines of input. The first line of a test case contains the integer N. The second line contains the string S. The third line contains the integer Q. The next Q lines contain the actual queries.
content.outputFormat: For each test case, for each query of type 2, output in separate lines the value of ppp followed by qqq.

sampleTestCases.explanation: For the first query of type 1, we replace the characters in the string S from position 1 to 2 with B. For the second query of type 2, we perform the given operations on the characters in the string S from position 1 to 2.

For the first query of type 1, we replace the characters in the string S from position 1 to 2 with B. For the second query of type 2, we perform the given operations on the characters in the string S from position 1 to 2.

For the first query of type 1, we replace the characters in the string S from position 1 to 2 with B. For the second query of type 2, we perform the given operations on the characters in the string S from position 1 to 2. For the third query of type 1, we replace the characters in the string S from position 1 to 2 with B. For the fourth query of type 2, we perform the given operations on the characters in the string S from position 1 to 2.

solution.approach: For each query of type 1, we simply replace the characters in the string S from position L to R with CCC. For each query of type 2, we perform the given operations on the characters in the string S from position L to R. We use modular arithmetic to ensure that the values of p and q do not exceed 10^9.
solution.timeComplexity: O(N + Q) with a time complexity of O(1) per query, where N is the length of the string S and Q is the number of queries.
solution.spaceComplexity: O(N) to store the string S.

code.Python3:
import sys
import math
MOD = 1000000007

T = int(sys.stdin.readline().strip())
while T > 0:
    N = int(sys.stdin.readline().strip())
    s = sys.stdin.readline().strip()
    Q = int(sys.stdin.readline().strip())
    while Q > 0:
        l, r, p, q = map(int, sys.stdin.readline().strip().split())
        if s[l - 1] == 'A':
            p = (p - q + MOD) % MOD
            q = (p + q) % MOD
        else:
            p = (p + q) % MOD
            q = (q - p + MOD) % MOD
        print(p, q)
        Q -= 1
    T -= 1
